examples: Shaun was in the bedroom, out of earshot, watching television.
We waited until Ted was safely out of earshot before discussing it.
As she came within earshot of the group, she heard her name mentioned.
Out of earshot nearby, lions will be grunting, baboons barking and elephants busy demolishing a tree.
He has long broadcast his e-mail address to anyone within earshot and has no handler doing his responses.
